signature.name: Reconciliation

states.balanced: Equilibrium flows from genuine integration — centered presence holding complexity
states.tooMuch: Premature harmony — conflict avoidance, suppressing necessary distinctions
states.tooLittle: Chronic fragmentation — inability to find center, scattered by every engagement
states.unacknowledged: Not knowing how you're integrating — or that you aren't

signature.description: Gathering thoughts into alignment. Strategic mental integration.
signature.extended: Balance (14) expressed through Air at the operative scale. Same parent as Repose (35) but at the outer face: where Repose rests in mental stillness (inner/peaceful), Reconciliation gathers scattered thoughts into strategic alignment (outer/gathering). Emotion Feedback through Air: integrating emotional learning through active mental work. Number 7 is Gathering/Reaping — the outer face of the Emotion pair, where the harvest of mental equilibrium requires effort to collect. When this appears as a transient, multiple lines of thought need gathering into a coherent strategy.

resolvedPositionData.name: Balance

states.balanced: Equilibrium flows from genuine integration — centered presence holding complexity
states.tooMuch: Premature harmony — conflict avoidance, suppressing necessary distinctions
states.tooLittle: Chronic fragmentation — inability to find center, scattered by every engagement
states.unacknowledged: Not knowing how you're integrating — or that you aren't

resolvedPositionData.extended: Continuous adjustment that maintains flow. Not static middle but active calibration — sensing when to add, when to subtract, how to blend.
